authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(78) — Lee Vining Creek from the Lee Vining conduit downstream to Mono Lake (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (78) Lee Vining Creek from the Lee Vining conduit downstream to Mono Lake (Mono Co.). Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. 2 trout. 4 trout in possession. Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: 2026 California Freshwater Sport Fishing Regulations (updated June 1, 2026)
Lee Vining Creek | Visit Mono County
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon — CDFW
sources.quotedText: R6 Mono Lee Vining Creek Rainbow Trout Catchable Put and Take April-November

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 262402, "Lee Vining Creek", Stream, CA, Mono Co.
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":262402,"gaz_name":"Lee Vining Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono","objectid_1":1665781}. Corrects prior file coordinates (-119.1170, 37.9650), which were off by ~1.9 km from GNIS's recorded point at the creek's mouth (-119.10183, 37.97771), a small sandy delta on the western shore of Mono Lake about 1 mi north of the town of Lee Vining — matches Wikipedia's cited mouth coordinates (37.97778, -119.10194).

regulations.humanSummary: Open Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30 (2-trout limit); open October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day for artificial-lure, barbless-hook catch-and-release only
regulations.verbatimText: Sat. preceding Memorial Day through Sep. 30. ... Oct. 1 through the Fri. preceding Memorial Day.

parameters.counting_rule: 2 trout daily bag, 4 trout in possession, Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30.

regulations.humanSummary: 2 trout daily bag, 4 trout in possession, Saturday preceding Memorial Day through September 30

parameters.note: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used, October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day.

regulations.humanSummary: Artificial lures with barbless hooks only, October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.counting_rule: Zero trout may be retained October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day; all trout caught must be released unharmed.

regulations.humanSummary: 0 trout (catch and release only), October 1 through the Friday preceding Memorial Day

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Lee Vining Creek (Region 6, Mono Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of April-November. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
